AsyncResult)
PoolProxy.__enter__c
PoolProxy.__exit__N)
    Subclass of `BaseManager` which supports a number of shared object types.
    The types registered are those intended for the synchronization
    of threads, plus `dict`, `list` and `Namespace`.
    The `multiprocessing.Manager()` function creates started instances of
    this class.
    N)
QueueZ
JoinableQueueru
RLock
	Semaphore
BoundedSemaphore
	Condition
Barrier
Poolr%
_SharedMemoryTrackerz+Manages one or more shared memory segments.c
shared_memory_context_name
segment_names)
_SharedMemoryTracker.__init__c
z6Adds the supplied shared memory block name to tracker.z
Register segment 
 in pid N)
segment_namer
register_segment
z%_SharedMemoryTracker.register_segmentc
Calls unlink() on the shared memory block with the supplied name
            and removes it from the list of blocks being tracked.z
Destroy segment r
N)	r
SharedMemoryr
unlink)
segmentr

z$_SharedMemoryTracker.destroy_segmentc
z<Calls destroy_segment() on all tracked shared memory blocks.N)

SharedMemoryServer)

list_segmentsc
shm_rV
z"SharedMemoryServer started by pid )
fsdecoder~
shared_memory_contextr
kwargsr+
SharedMemoryServer.__init__c
Create a new distributed-shared object (not backed by a shared
            memory block) and return its id to be used in a Proxy Object.r
_shared_memory_proxyr
SharedMemoryServer.createc
zACall unlink() on all tracked shared memory, terminate the Server.)
SharedMemoryServer.shutdownc
z?Adds the supplied shared memory block name to Server's tracker.N)
z SharedMemoryServer.track_segmentc
Calls unlink() on the shared memory block with the supplied name
            and removes it from the tracker instance inside the Server.N)
z"SharedMemoryServer.release_segmentc
zbReturns a list of names of shared memory blocks that the Server
            is currently tracking.)
z SharedMemoryServer.list_segmentsN)
Like SyncManager but uses SharedMemoryServer instead of Server.
        It provides methods for creating and returning SharedMemory instances
        and for creating a list-like object (ShareableList) backed by shared
        memory.  It also provides methods that create and return Proxy Objects
        that support synchronization across processes (i.e. multi-process-safe
        locks and semaphores).
        c
posixr
resource_trackerz
 created by pid )
ensure_runningr
SharedMemoryManager.__init__c
.__del__ by pid )
SharedMemoryManager.__del__c
z@Better than monkeypatching for now; merge into Server ultimatelyz"Already started SharedMemoryServerz!SharedMemoryManager has shut downr
SharedMemoryManager.get_serverc
zoReturns a new SharedMemory instance with the specified size in
            bytes, to be tracked by the manager.r
sizer
BaseExceptionr
smsr
z SharedMemoryManager.SharedMemoryc
Returns a new ShareableList instance populated with the values
            from the input sequence, to be tracked by the manager.r

shmr
